text.title: Programmatic SEO Patterns Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Programmatic SEO Patterns output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: data_source populated with a typed value
intent_template_map populated with a typed value
thin_content_threshold populated with a typed value
indexability_tiers populated with a typed value
internal_link_graph populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
